snippet.description:
Eyyy, the one and only 100% Awesome here. Good to see you on my channel which by the way, is a minecraft tutorial channel. I therefore mainly upload redstone tutorial about for example automatic farms, every month. I also do some building videos sometimes. This channel is unique because of my good relationship with my viewers, you. I read and interact with almost every single comment I see, so if you have any questions after watching one of my tutorials, feel free to ask! I also stick out for my originality and honesty. My videos are always straight to the point, short and designs are well tested before being shared with you. This guarantees you the best designs out there.

Nearly all my designs are home made so if you yourself want to make a video about one of my designs, make sure to credit my channel.

Check out my own server and website!
Website: http://100awesome.net/home/server.html
Server IP: 100awesome.net

For private questions mail to joeridukker3@gmail.com
snippet.title: 100% Awesome

You can check out my full portfolio and the creative services I offer at LogosByNick.com. In addition to Inkscape tutorials, I also have more in-depth content about design and the business of freelancing on my Facebook page, so be sure to check that out as well.

snippet.description: Apandah is a satire of those on the internet that hyper fixate on everything, live in a constant state of negativity, hypocrisy, offensiveness, narcissism and outspokenness. Rather than a role model, Apandah is meant to be spectacle of someone you shouldn’t be, while (hopefully) being fun to watch. When this channel first started this concept wasn’t realized but is now what the Apandah character represents. -Tc

snippet.description:
Attention : Chaîne de jeux ne convenant pas à des enfants. Beaucoup de nos jeux sont 18+ et nous nous exprimons sans retenue.

Autrefois, Fanta et Bob vivaient dans l'univers épique du jeu vidéo. Deux amis aux personnalités opposées qui pourtant s'adorent. 
Désormais, seul Bob fait du contenu sur cette chaine. Mais l'esprit du Fanta demeure,  et ne nous souhaitons que vous transmettre deux choses : notre passion pour les bons jeux et notre bonne humeur légendaire.
Vous êtes formidables !

Important : Je lis vos commentaires, c'est la dissidence. Soyez sympas envers les-un-les-autres !!

ENGLISH : You want us to show your game on our channel ? Contact us, we speak english too. Please ignore fake key query from fakes. We are not begging for keys but you can send us your game keys or sponsored coverage offers using the only legit mail down there.
snippet.title: Bob Lennon

snippet.description: Apandah is a satire of those on the internet that hyper fixate on everything, live in a constant state of negativity, hypocrisy, offensiveness, narcissism and outspokenness. Rather than a role model, Apandah is meant to be spectacle of someone you shouldn’t be, while (hopefully) being fun to watch. When this channel first started this concept wasn’t realized but is now what the Apandah character represents. -Tc
snippet.title: apandah

snippet.description: NOOB est un univers étendu sur le thème du MMORPG. C'est aussi une licence transmédia existant en web-série, bande dessinée, roman, light novel, manga, jeu vidéo, etc... La web-série a dépassé les 100 millions de vues tous médias confondus et reste à ce jour la plus vue en France. Elle a aussi battu le record d'Europe de crowdfunding deux fois (2013 et 2017) et a obtenu l'Awards international 2014 aux Streamy de Los Angeles.
snippet.title: OLYDRI

snippet.description:
LowSpecGamer is a channel dedicated to budget gaming and low graphics, from pushing entry-level and old hardware to its limits to forcing the lowest graphics on modern games by all means possible. On the way might learn about what affects a game performance, how to get the best of what you have or what do you really need to play on VR or the true value of a "Gaming Phone".

Let's get started.
snippet.title: LowSpecGamer

snippet.description:
Subscribe for regular DARK SOULS, DARK SOULS 2, DARK SOULS 3, DEMON'S SOULS, BLOODBORNE, and SEKIRO: SHADOWS DIE TWICE content!..Lore..Gameplay..Music..Animation..

Every video I upload is held to a certain standard. I emphasise Quality over Quantity and I don't want to clog up your feed with mediocre videos.

====================

-Aim for one video per week

-Souls-like titles are at the heart of this channel

-This channel is supported primarily through Patreon.com/vaatividya, not advertisements!

====================

Have a question or comment related to my videos? I respond best on ask-vaati, a Discord text channel for patrons-only.

Artists may receive an email from soulartsbook@gmail.com

Business-only Email below. DO NOT SEND LORE THEORIES TO MY EMAIL
snippet.title: VaatiVidya
